rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §37.1131 governs school district notification standards for violent activity; it is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The agency shall develop model standards for providing notice regarding violent activity that has occurred or is being investigated at a school district campus
_note: Rule text concerns school safety notification policy, not property tax exemptions. No overlap with proposed change.
